'''Garv Debble''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Xenoarchaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] who insisted that relics plundered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] from other [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] should be returned to their proper owners. His name was given to the [[Debble Agreement]], which had been negotiated between him and the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

Debble and his team were appointed to investigate and document all the artifacts and information [[Mount Tantiss dig|discovered]] in the Empire's [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] facility, following the defeat of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. He was nearly thwarted in this effort by [[Ekhrikhor]], a Noghri, who wanted all of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] belongings destroyed. Leia Organa Solo eventually intervened and allowed Debble to complete his work.
